General.Name: Oriental Rise Holdings Limited Ordinary Shares
General.Description: Oriental Rise Holdings Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in planting, cultivating, processing, and selling of primarily-processed tea in Mainland China. The company offers primarily-processed black and white tea, and refined tea. It sells its products to the tea business operators and end-user retail customers. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is based in Ningde, China.
